prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏 高（2024–2026年均为高热推荐/推荐），与该校物理类主力招生方向匹配；湖南省2026年物理类考生约34.7万人，较2025年32.0万人增加约8.4%，竞争加剧；省控线（本科批）20 25年为405分，近年呈小幅下降趋势；合肥工业大学（宣城校区）位于安徽，距湖南较近，属于中部地区高校，对湖南考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在湖南招生 计划占比较高，属于该校在省外的重要生源地。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年断档后的反弹预期、2026年招生计划基本持平、湖南省物理类考生增加约8.4%以及计算机/电气等热 门专业持续高热，预计2026年物理类最低位次将较2025年明显回升（位次数字减小），但难以回到2024年水平；预测最低位次约34137名，区间33637–34637名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 23683 → 20678 → 18878 → 16588 → 35850. From 2021 to 2024, it showed a year-by-year forward trend (decreasing ranking number), but in 2025, there was an abnormal large backward shift (from 16588 to 35850, a backward shift of about 19262 places), which is a clear year of discontinuity/abnormal admission; the university's enrollment plan in Hunan for Physics Category was stable at 88–89 students from 2021 to 2024, expanded to 101 students in 2025, and the 2026 plan is 100 students, a slight decrease of 1 student compared to 2025, basically unchanged.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 80th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings in the 79–83 range in recent years; reputation evaluation in 2025 was relatively negative, mainly involving a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors and some majors with no applicants; reputation in 2026 was relatively negative, involving academic misconduct incidents; Douyin popularity ranked 77th with average reviews. The 2025 discontinuity event may have a lagging effect on the 2026 application psychology, with some candidates possibly increasing their willingness to apply due to a 'bargain hunting' mentality; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering was rated A, the only A-level discipline at the university; traditional engineering disciplines such as Mechanical Engineering and Materials Science and Engineering are relatively strong, highly correlated with the majors offered at the Xuancheng Campus (Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, New Energy Materials, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering remains consistently high (highly recommended/recommended from 2024 to 2026), matching the main recruitment direction of the university's Physics Category; the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province in 2026 is approximately 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% compared to 325,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 405 points in 2025, showing a slight downward trend in recent years; Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) is located in Anhui, relatively close to Hunan, and is a central region university with some regional appeal to Hunan candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Hunan accounts for a relatively high proportion, making it an important source of students outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the expected rebound after the 2025 discontinuity, the basically unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the approximately 8.4% increase in Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province, and the sustained high popularity of popular majors such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will significantly recover compared to 2025 (decreasing ranking number), but it will be difficult to return to the 2024 level; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 34137, with a range of 33637–34637.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 34137 (range 33637–34637). It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 33000 focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Software; candidates with rankings between 34000–35000 should mainly choose Tier 2 majors such as Mechanical Engineering, New Energy Materials, and Process Equipment as their primary options, while also considering borderline Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings after 35000 should use Tier 3 majors as safety options, among which Logistics Management, relying on the A-level discipline of Management Science and Engineering, offers relatively high cost-effectiveness.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第80名（2026年），近年排名稳定；2025年声誉偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌），2026年声誉偏负 面（学术不端事件）；抖音热度一般。历史类招生专业少（仅网络与新媒体、英语等），整体关注度不高；管理科学与工程A级为该校最强学科，但历史类招生 专业（网络与新媒体、英语、法学）与该学科关联较弱；无直接对应的A级人文社科类学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 网络与新媒体属新闻传播大类，社会热度明显劝退（2023年h eat_index仅31.59）；英语属外语类，社会热度一般观望；法学属法学类，社会热度推荐但分化明显；湖南省2026年历史类考生约18.7万人，较2025年14.25万人大幅增加约31.2% ，竞争显著加剧；省控线（本科批）2025年为446分，近年波动不大；该校位于安徽宣城，对湖南考生有一定地域吸引力；历史类招生人数极少（10–15人），招 生规模小，位次波动相对较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历史类位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（+1人）但湖南省历史类考生大幅增加约31%、以及新闻传播类专业社会热 度明显劝退等因素，预计2026年历史类最低位次在2025年5934名基础上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约6210名，区间5710–6710名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 4361 → 5452 → 4963 → 5583 → 5934, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend (ranking numbers increasing). In the past 3 years, it has shifted backward by about 971 places, with a baseline of approximately 5934 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hunan was 14 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 10 in 2025 (significantly reduced). The 2026 plan is 11, an increase of 1 (+10%) compared to 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 80th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings in recent years. In 2025, reputation was slightly negative (hot majors' admission scores plummeted), and in 2026, reputation remains slightly negative (academic misconduct incidents). Douyin popularity is average. History Category has few majors (only Network and New Media, English, etc.), with overall low attention. Management Science and Engineering (A-level) is the university's strongest discipline, but History Category majors (Network and New Media, English, Law) are weakly related to it. There are no directly corresponding A-level humanities or social science disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Network and New Media belongs to the Journalism and Communication category, with significantly declining social popularity (heat_index only 31.59 in 2023). English belongs to the Foreign Language category, with average and wait-and-see social popularity. Law belongs to the Law category, with recommended but polarized social popularity. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Hunan is approximately 187,000, a substantial increase of about 31.2% from 142,500 in 2025, leading to significantly intensified competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 446 in 2025, with little fluctuation in recent years. The university is located in Xuancheng, Anhui, which has some regional appeal for Hunan examinees. History Category enrollment is extremely small (10–15 people), and with a small enrollment scale, ranking fluctuations are relatively large.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of History Category rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+1 person), but the significant increase of about 31% in History Category examinees in Hunan, and the clearly declining social popularity of Journalism and Communication majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 5934. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6210, with a range of 5710–6710.

It is recommended that examinees with rankings within 6000 prioritize Network and New Media; those with rankings between 6000–6500 mainly choose English; those with rankings above 6500 should apply cautiously, as the university's History Category enrollment quota is small and competition is concentrated.
